content:
**19. Chapter 7 - Part 1**
Out of wheel jail (for now) and why. Covenant for this team at this point in the game.

https://youtu.be/v68vH4sDS2Q

**20. Chapter 7 - Part 2**
My microphone driver didn't work...and I didn't notice. This video has no talking in it.

https://youtu.be/TEYct09DEpghttps://youtu.be/TEYct09DEpg

**21. Final Boss - Chapter 7**
Before the boss, there is a lot of strategic gameplay knowledge dropped. We are at the point where I use more strategy to navigate the level. If you want to get better at playing the game watch the entire video!

https://youtu.be/iUanJyp3hoI

**22. DTide Prep - Making Your First Teams**
How to make your first teams for DTide. Everything involved.
Starting Formula: Damage Dealer / Keyflare Generator / Healer / Defender

https://youtu.be/9VenPsIk81E

**23. Chapter 8**
What is HSR? How to go there. N Fight.

https://youtu.be/NcPdXqm7S4o

**24. Mini Boss Aisha**
Hard enough to deserve her own video.

https://youtu.be/oqVKT66GB7c

**25. Final Boss - Chapter 8**
Struggle bus is real. Account is fairly low leveled for this.

https://youtu.be/SXw2xeFp0jI

**----------------------------First DTide ----------------------------------**
Team 1: Basic Strategy https://youtu.be/yN3KDYILItM
Team 2: Borrow Unit https://youtu.be/e5Gszn8oOUY
Team 3: Weakest Team https://youtu.be/iDCcYpoNYl4
Team 4: Hardest Wave https://youtu.be/xVxW2W6C42E
Team 5: Closing Crew https://youtu.be/x74rUJJc_ig
**----------------------------------------------------------------------------**

**26. Chapter 9**
Let the Eye Gauntlet begin.

https://youtu.be/ayOwUoO7Uqk

**27. Final Boss - Chapter 9**
Recap of the entire New Account Strategy going in and some lessons learned.

Final, Final Boss Fight of Arc 1.

https://youtu.be/CgEFz7M_-4E
